It's another notable win for Beau Greaves as she edges out Marti
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 8s 𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗦 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗦𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗟𝗘𝗥
It's another notable win for Beau Greaves as she edges out Martin Schindler with an 80 finish in the last-leg decider to reach Round Two in Wigan Beau Greaves

item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min 𝗛𝘂𝗺𝗽𝗵𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗞𝗶𝘀𝘁
Luke Humphries has fallen at the first hurdle in Players Championship
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min 𝗛𝘂𝗺𝗽𝗵𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗞𝗶𝘀𝘁
Luke Humphries has fallen at the first hurdle in Players Championship 10, losing in the first round to Christian Kist despite averaging nearly nine points higher.
The World No.2 was punished for missed doubles, checking out at Mostrar más 10

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 3min 𝗞𝗜𝗦𝗧 𝗞𝗢𝘀 𝗖𝗢𝗢𝗟 𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗
Christian Kist capitalises on another nightmare on the doubles from Lu
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 3min 𝗞𝗜𝗦𝗧 𝗞𝗢𝘀 𝗖𝗢𝗢𝗟 𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗
Christian Kist capitalises on another nightmare on the doubles from Luke Humphries (27%) as he recovers from 4-1 down to reel off five straight legs and snatch a 6-4 victory in the opening round 2 1 250
